organizations.notes: Ellen Wood founded vcfo in Austin in 1996 and is its CEO; a UT graduate and registered Texas CPA who has spent her whole career in Austin. Filing occupations 'CEO/CFO' and employer 'vcfo/VCFO' match her firm bio exactly. Her full bio documents an extensive Austin business-civic record (Austin Chamber past chair, Opportunity Austin board, Texas Business Leadership Council). No Texas Ethics Commission lobbyist registration found and no PAC/ideological affiliations on any tracked spectrum (Israel/Palestine, guns, oil & gas, defense) surfaced in public records; her documented affiliations are business/economic-development civic bodies.

organizations.role: Travis County Commissioner, Precinct 3, 2002-08 & 2013-2020; described in press coverage as 'Travis County's last Republican' commissioner
organizations.notes: Zip 78735 matches the Austin home address (1403 Club Ridge Cove) on Gerald T. Daugherty's Texas Ethics Commission lobbyist registration, and occupation 'RETIRED' matches his December 2020 retirement from the Travis County Commissioners Court after 14 years as the county's sole Republican commissioner. He later became a restaurateur (Jack Allen's Kitchen) after decades as owner of Pleasant Valley Sportsplex. FEC/PAC-side searches (Club for Growth, NRA, Republican Party of Texas PAC, etc.) turned up general Republican-donor-space results but no specific PAC-board or PAC-leadership record tied to him personally beyond the existing 250-donation federal giving history already on file.

organizations.role: Registered lobbyist, 2010-2011, listed at his Austin, TX 78735 home address, appearing under multiple subject-matter categories

organizations.org: Central Health performance-audit advocacy (Travis County Commissioners Court)
organizations.role: Public advocate / speaker before Commissioners Court
organizations.notes: Almost certainly Susan A. Spataro, CPA, who served ~24 years as Travis County Auditor until Travis County district judges removed her in August 2012; she is publicly described in Austin news coverage as 'retired Travis County Auditor' and remains an active Austin civic voice (Central Health audit advocacy). Corroborated by name + Austin location + 'RETIRED' occupation on the filing; the news sources do not state her zip, so identity is strong but not zip-confirmed.
